languages.text: {n}Человек словно сплавлен с машиной за его спиной: посиневшая по краю кожа почти бесшовно переходит в неизвестный вам металл, а плоть в десятках мест пронзена трубками, иглами и колбами с пузырящейся жидкостью. При вашем приближении изможденное человеческое тело приходит в движение: голова, словно на ниточке незримого кукловода, поднимается вверх. Серая кожа, безжизненные ввалившиеся глаза, запавшая между выпирающими костями плоть — перед вами мертвец, который, однако, продолжает двигаться.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The man appears fused to the machine behind his back: the edges of his skin have turned blue where it seamlessly melds into a metal unlike anything you have seen before, and his flesh is pierced with dozens of needles, pipes and tubes of bubbling liquid. When you approach, the emaciated human body jerks into motion: the head rises as if attached to an invisible puppeteer's string. Grey skin, lifeless sunken eyes, flesh barely clinging to the protruding bones — before you is a dead man who nevertheless continues to move.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Mann scheint mit der Maschine hinter seinem Rücken verschmolzen zu sein: Die Ränder seiner Haut haben sich blau verfärbt, wo sie nahtlos in ein Metall übergeht, wie Sie es noch nie zuvor gesehen haben, und sein Fleisch ist von Dutzenden von Nadeln, Rohren und Schläuchen mit blubbernder Flüssigkeit durchbohrt. Wenn man sich ihm nähert, setzt sich der ausgemergelte menschliche Körper ruckartig in Bewegung: Der Kopf hebt sich, als hänge er an der Schnur eines unsichtbaren Puppenspielers. Graue Haut, leblose, eingesunkene Augen, Fleisch, das kaum noch an den hervorstehenden Knochen haftet — vor Ihnen steht ein toter Mann, der sich dennoch weiter bewegt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man appears fused to the machine behind his back: the edges of his skin have turned blue where it seamlessly melds into a metal unlike anything you have seen before, and his flesh is pierced with dozens of needles, pipes and tubes of bubbling liquid. When you approach, the emaciated human body jerks into motion: the head rises as if attached to an invisible puppeteer's string. Grey skin, lifeless sunken eyes, flesh barely clinging to the protruding bones — before you is a dead man who nevertheless continues to move.{/n}

Wenn man sich ihm nähert, setzt sich der ausgemergelte menschliche Körper ruckartig in Bewegung: Der Kopf hebt sich, als hänge er an der Schnur eines unsichtbaren Puppenspielers. Graue Haut, leblose, eingesunkene Augen, Fleisch, das kaum noch an den hervorstehenden Knochen haftet — vor Ihnen steht ein toter Mann, der sich dennoch weiter bewegt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'homme semble soudé à la machine qui se trouve dans son dos : les bords de sa peau sont devenus bleus là où elle se fond dans un métal comme vous n'en avez jamais vu auparavant, et sa chair est percée de dizaines d'aiguilles, de tuyaux et de tubes de liquide bouillonnant. Lorsque vous vous approchez, le corps humain décharné se met en mouvement par à-coups : la tête se lève comme si elle était attachée à la ficelle d'un marionnettiste invisible. Peau grise, yeux enfoncés sans vie, chair à peine accrochée aux os saillants : devant vous, un homme mort qui continue pourtant à bouger.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man appears fused to the machine behind his back: the edges of his skin have turned blue where it seamlessly melds into a metal unlike anything you have seen before, and his flesh is pierced with dozens of needles, pipes and tubes of bubbling liquid. When you approach, the emaciated human body jerks into motion: the head rises as if attached to an invisible puppeteer's string. Grey skin, lifeless sunken eyes, flesh barely clinging to the protruding bones — before you is a dead man who nevertheless continues to move.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El hombre parece fusionado a la máquina que tiene a sus espaldas: los bordes de su piel se han vuelto azules donde se funde a la perfección con un metal distinto a todo lo que has visto antes, y su carne está perforada por docenas de agujas, tuberías y tubos de líquido burbujeante. Cuando te acercas, el escuálido cuerpo humano se pone en movimiento: la cabeza se eleva como si estuviera sujeta a los hilos de un titiritero invisible. Piel gris, ojos hundidos sin vida, carne que apenas se aferra a los huesos que sobresalen... ante ti hay un hombre muerto que, sin embargo, sigue moviéndose.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man appears fused to the machine behind his back: the edges of his skin have turned blue where it seamlessly melds into a metal unlike anything you have seen before, and his flesh is pierced with dozens of needles, pipes and tubes of bubbling liquid. When you approach, the emaciated human body jerks into motion: the head rises as if attached to an invisible puppeteer's string. Grey skin, lifeless sunken eyes, flesh barely clinging to the protruding bones — before you is a dead man who nevertheless continues to move.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Adam arkasındaki makineyle kaynaşmış gibi görünüyor: derisinin kenarları daha önce gördüğünüz hiçbir şeye benzemeyen bir metalle kusursuz bir şekilde birleştiği yerde maviye dönmüş ve eti düzinelerce iğne, boru ve fokurdayan sıvı tüpleriyle delinmiş. Yaklaştığınızda, bir deri bir kemik kalmış insan bedeni sarsılarak harekete geçiyor: Başı görünmez bir kuklacının ipine bağlıymış gibi yükseliyor. Gri deri, cansız çökük gözler, çıkıntılı kemiklere zar zor tutunan et — önünüzde yine de hareket etmeye devam eden ölü bir adam var.{/n}
